hero.h1: Digital marketing agency and custom web design in the Canary Islands.

about.subtitle: More than an agency, we’re strategic partners in your digital transformation.
about.philosophyText: At KORA, we believe in authenticity above all. We don’t use templates or generic solutions. Every project starts with a deep analysis of your business’s specific needs.
about.focusText: We work with agile methodologies, but with a handcrafted mindset. Every line of code, every design, every strategy is built not only to create a digital product, but to become an extension of your brand.

history.title: Our Story
history.subtitle: Where it all began.
history.heading: From a shared idea to a purpose-driven reality
history.text1: KORA was founded in 2026 by three friends from the Canary Islands with a clear vision: to create an agency that not only executes, but thinks. Tired of generic solutions, we decided to build a space where strategy and digital craftsmanship come together.
history.text2: Our purpose is simple. In an increasingly automated world, we want digital tools to help brands connect with people in an authentic way. We are not looking to build "websites", we aim to create platforms that tell stories, solve problems, and generate real growth. We want to be the technological partner that truly understands your business and drives it forward.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: Behind every project, there are people. Get to know us.

iriem.bio: Passionate about creating digital experiences that not only look great but work flawlessly. His attention to detail and user-focused mindset ensure that every project tells a compelling and cohesive visual story.

fernando.bio: With both an analytical and creative mindset, Fernando turns ideas into clean and efficient code. He ensures that technology not only works but impresses, always seeking the best technical solution for every challenge.

fabio.bio: The team's strategist. Fabio ensures that every action aligns with business objectives. His ability to understand client needs and translate them into opportunities makes him the engine of growth.

cta.title: Like what you see?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about how we can help you achieve your goals.

legalNotice.title: 1. LEGAL NOTICE
legalNotice.intro: In compliance with the duty to inform set out in Article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSICE), the general details of the entity that owns this website are provided below:
legalNotice.purposeText: KORA SOLUTIONS’ website is primarily intended to inform users about the services offered by the agency (Web Development, Brand Identity Design and AI Automations), as well as to provide a contact channel for requesting quotes and strategic consulting.
legalNotice.ipText: All intellectual and industrial property rights to the contents of this website (including, but not limited to, texts, images, logos, graphic design, structure, and database) belong to KORA SOLUTIONS, unless otherwise stated. Reproduction, distribution, public communication, or transformation of these contents is expressly prohibited without the owner’s prior written authorization.
legalNotice.liabilityText: KORA SOLUTIONS is not responsible for any damages arising from the use of the content on its website. Nor does it guarantee the absence of viruses or other harmful elements that could damage the user’s computer system. The user is solely responsible for how they use the services and content of the site.
legalNotice.lawText: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any disputes arising from access to or use of the website, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of the province of Las Palmas (Canary Islands), expressly waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.

privacy.title: 2. PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.intro: At KORA SOLUTIONS, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy aims to inform you about how we collect, process, and protect the information you provide through our website and within the context of our business relationship.
privacy.dataHeading: What personal data do we collect?
privacy.dataIntro: We may collect the following personal data through our contact form and during the provision of services:

dataValues.business: Information about your company and project that you provide in your communications.

privacy.purposeHeading: Purpose and Legal Basis of Processing
privacy.purposeIntro: We process your personal data for the following purposes:

purposes.contact: Manage information and contact requests: Respond to inquiries submitted through the contact form. The legal basis is the consent you provide by accepting the corresponding checkbox.
purposes.contract: Provision of services and contractual relationship: Manage the commercial relationship if you decide to hire our services. The legal basis is the execution of a contract.
purposes.marketing: Sending commercial communications: With your prior consent, we may send you information about our services and updates that may be of interest to you. You may withdraw this consent at any time.

privacy.retentionText: Personal data will be retained for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected. Once the relationship ends, the data will be properly blocked for the legally established limitation periods to address potential liabilities. For marketing communications, we will retain your data until you request to unsubscribe.
privacy.recipientsText: Data will not be disclosed to third parties except where legally required. Technology service providers (such as hosting or email services) acting as Data Processors may have access to your data, with whom we have signed the appropriate agreements in accordance with applicable regulations.
privacy.rightsText1: You have the right to obtain confirmation as to whether we are processing your personal data. You also have the right to access your data, request rectification of inaccurate data, or request its deletion when, among other reasons, the data is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.
privacy.rightsText2: In certain circumstances, you may request the restriction of processing or object to the processing of your data, in which case we will only retain it for the exercise or defense of legal claims.
privacy.rightsText3: To exercise these rights, you may send a written request attaching a copy of your ID card or equivalent identification document to the following email address: info@koradigitalsolutions.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD).

cookies.title: 3. COOKIE POLICY
cookies.intro: At KORA SOLUTIONS, we use our own and third-party cookies to improve your browsing experience on our website, as well as to analyze traffic and user behavior. This policy explains what cookies are, which types we use, and how you can manage them.
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, mobile phone) when you visit a website. Their main purpose is to recognize you and remember information about your visit—such as your preferred language or configuration options—to make future visits easier and the site more useful.
cookies.typesIntro: We classify cookies according to their purpose:

technical.title: Technical Cookies (Necessary):
technical.text: These are essential for the basic operation of the website and browsing. They allow, for example, session identification or access to secure areas. Without these cookies, the website cannot function properly. They do not require your consent.

analytics.title: Analytics or Measurement Cookies:
analytics.text: These cookies, whether processed by us or by third parties, allow us to quantify the number of visitors and statistically analyze how users use our website. This helps us improve the services we offer.

preferences.title: Preference or Personalization Cookies:
preferences.text: They allow information to be remembered so that the user accesses the service with certain features that can differentiate their experience from that of other users, such as language or currency.

cookies.note: Note: Currently, this website only uses technical and analytics cookies. We do not use behavioral advertising or remarketing cookies.
cookies.thirdPartiesText: On our website, we use third-party services to measure and analyze traffic. Providers of these services may set cookies on your device. Below is a list of the third parties we work with and links to their cookie/privacy policies so you can learn more:

googleAnalytics.label: Google Analytics:
googleAnalytics.textBeforeLinks: Managed by Google, Inc. You can review its policy at

cookies.manageText1: When you first access our website, you will see a cookie banner that allows you to accept or configure your preferences, except for technical cookies which are necessary for browsing.
cookies.manageText2: You can allow, block, or delete cookies installed on your device through your browser settings. Below are links with information on how to manage cookies in the most common browsers:
cookies.warning: Please note that if you block or do not accept cookies, certain services or website features may not be available or may not function properly.
